calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Meeti Sudame, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, EDWARD WILLIAM.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) HAMILTON SUPPLY CO. INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that Judgment be entered for Plaintiff EDWARD WILLIAM SHORTALL and against Defendant HAMILTON SUPPLY CO., INC., for interest in the amoung of $3,394.52.
FURTHER, IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that plaintiff is awarded costs in the amount of $615.00.
The total amount of the Judgment is $4,009.52.
Judgment signed in open court.
